slime.name: Slime
slime.description: A small, gelatinous creature that can be found in various colors and sizes. They are often considered weak, but can be dangerous in large numbers.

goblin.name: Goblin
goblin.description: A mischievous and cunning creature that often dwells in caves or forests. They are known for their agility and quick attacks.

dragon.name: Dragon
dragon.description: A powerful and fearsome creature that breathes fire and has scales as hard as armor. They are often considered the kings of the forest.
